topic: kick infra to_int trailing-garbage 0\n0 bug fix — `error: to_int: trailing garbage in 0\n0` fired in chflags-lock kick orchestrator prep phase (subagent spawn 전, witness tier1=0 falsifier=0 with __RC=1 __HEXA_RC=2). Audit, root-cause, fix, regress, re-run.

gamma.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_simbad invocation=tool/simbad_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

core_5_op_kernel.1_intake_topic: kick infra to_int trailing-garbage 0\n0 bug fix — error fires from runtime hexa_str_parse_int (build/self/runtime.c:5463) when probe stdout carries multi-line content; bare or partially-wrapped to_int callsites in kick_dispatch.hexa let the throw escape past the catch-all and uncaught-exception-exit (HEXA_RC=2) kills the orchestrator before subagent_dispatch is reached.

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: zero-bare-to-int-in-kick-paths
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: every to_int(...) callsite in tool/kick_dispatch.hexa + cli/run.hexa#cmd_kick path is either inside a try/catch OR routed through a split-first-line helper
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: grep -n 'to_int(' tool/kick_dispatch.hexa | filter not-inside-fn-_safe_to_int_line and not-inside-try-block

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: multiline-probe-injection-graceful
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion:
regression suite injects 12 cases incl. literal '0
0', '42
99
extra', 'abc
5', '', '   
  
', clean ints, padded, negative, CRLF; all return expected default OR first-line value with NO uncaught exception

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: chflags-topic-re-run-sentinel-pass
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: kick_dispatch dry-run on the original chflags-lock topic completes with __KICK_RESULT__ PASS and __RC=0 (NOT FAIL with __RC=1 __HEXA_RC=2)

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: no-regression-other-working-topic
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: kick_dispatch dry-run on an unrelated topic (kick-bench-smoke) still returns __KICK_RESULT__ PASS __RC=0; no behaviour change for happy-path probes

3_fan_out_axes.rationale: introduce a single-source defensive helper _safe_to_int_line(raw, default, label) and route every probe→int conversion through it; eliminate the redundant to_int(to_string(n)) idempotent wrapper around already-typed i64 values; preserve fail-loud sentinel semantics by emitting raw 66 trailer (reason=to_int-probe-parse-fail-<label> fix=audit probe stdout) on parse failure so the audit trail is preserved while the cycle continues to graceful default. Correlation with falsifier-coverage axis < 0.7 — this axis chooses the abstraction shape, the other measures coverage breadth.

12-case regression matrix in tool/kick_to_int_safety_test.hexa exercises (a) the original bug shape '0\n0', (b) multi-line-first-wins, (c) first-line-garbage→default, (d) empty/whitespace, (e) clean happy path, (f) padding, (g) negative, (h) CRLF, (i) only-newline, (j) wc-empty-stdout, (k) ANU-style probe with trailing JSON noise. Coverage spans the actual probe shapes that feed to_int in the orchestrator: od /dev/urandom, wc -l, date +%s, BSD date -j parse, hexa-spawn __RC tail, ANU jsonI.php data field, resetsAt epoch.

4_tier_1_promotion_gate_via_falsifier_pa.promotion_criterion: all 4 falsifiers PASS: F1 (zero bare to_int) + F2 (multiline graceful) + F3 (chflags re-run PASS) + F4 (other topic regression 0)

root_cause.runtime_throw_site: /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/self/runtime.c:5460-5466 (hexa_str_parse_int rejects trailing non-whitespace after first numeric token)
root_cause.trigger_input: literal string "0\n0" (newline character between two zeros)
root_cause.trigger_path: exec(probe).trim() returned multi-line stdout where intervening newline + nonzero next-line tripped strtoll's trailing-garbage check; the bare to_int at tool/kick_dispatch.hexa:255 (`let idx = beta_byte % to_int(to_string(n))`) was the only mathematically-bare callsite, but defence-in-depth required ALL probe-derived to_ints to also split-first-line because (a) the runtime error message is identical regardless of which callsite throws, and (b) the orchestrator-prep window has 11+ probe→int conversions across α/β/γ envelope assembly + atlas pre/post line counting + spawn rc parsing. A single un-split probe anywhere in the pipeline could reproduce the failure mode.
root_cause.why_witness_was_tier1_0_falsifier_0_pre_: the throw escaped before the orchestrator finished the prep phase, so witness_path was never written; the kick_dispatch fail-fast eprintln at the end of main() did emit __KICK_RESULT__ FAIL but the witness file count stayed at zero because no JSON was ever written by the (never-spawned) subagent.

fix_summary.primary_change: added fn _safe_to_int_line(raw: str, default: i64, label: str) -> i64 to tool/kick_dispatch.hexa just below _hexa_bin(); helper trims, splits on first \n, takes first non-empty line, try/catch the to_int, on fail emits a raw 66 trailer to stderr (`# kick_dispatch: reason=to_int-probe-parse-fail-<label> fix=audit probe stdout (multiline / non-int) raw=\"<repr>\" default=<D>`) and returns default. ALL 11 probe-derived to_int callsites now route through the helper. The 1 mathematically-bare to_int(to_string(n)) at line 255 was rewritten to use n directly (n is already i64; the round-trip was redundant).

files_touched.change: +_safe_to_int_line helper (~25 LOC) + 11 callsite refactors + 1 redundant-wrapper removal at L255
NEW — 12-case regression suite exercising the helper with multi-line / garbage / happy-path inputs; sentinel __KICK_TO_INT_SAFETY__ <PASS|FAIL> cases=<N> failed=<N>

tier_1_promotions.rationale: Single-source defensive helper _safe_to_int_line(raw, default, label) replaces every probe→int conversion in tool/kick_dispatch.hexa. Bare to_int count drops from 1 (L255) to 0; the redundant to_int(to_string(n)) idempotent wrapper is excised because n is already i64. Pattern: probe-derived strings always go through the helper which trims, splits on first \n, try/catches, and emits a raw 66 trailer on parse fail before falling back to the default. Reusable across the broader nexus/hive tool fleet wherever exec(probe).trim() feeds to_int.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: grep 'to_int(' tool/kick_dispatch.hexa returns only the helper definition site (line 82 inside try) + 1 comment reference; 0 bare callsites remain.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: 12-case regression suite in tool/kick_to_int_safety_test.hexa locks the helper's contract under multi-line + garbage + happy-path probe shapes. The original bug input '0\n0' is the first case and now returns 0 (first-line value) without throwing. Suite exit 0; sentinel __KICK_TO_INT_SAFETY__ PASS cases=12 failed=0. Future regressions of the helper logic will fail-loud at this single test invocation.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: hexa run tool/kick_to_int_safety_test.hexa → __KICK_TO_INT_SAFETY__ PASS cases=12 failed=0 + __RC=0; the two intentional parse-fail cases (first-line-garbage, anu-byte-with-noise) emit the expected raw 66 trailer to stderr and return the default.

falsifier_outcomes.evidence: grep 'to_int(' tool/kick_dispatch.hexa shows only L82 (inside helper try-block) + L70 comment; 11 callsites refactored to _safe_to_int_line; 1 redundant wrapper removed
tool/kick_to_int_safety_test.hexa → __KICK_TO_INT_SAFETY__ PASS cases=12 failed=0 __RC=0 — original bug input '0\n0' first case, returns 0 (first-line) gracefully

hexa run tool/kick_dispatch.hexa <chflags-lock topic> --dry-run → __KICK_RESULT__ PASS witness=design/kick//...chflags...omega_cycle.json tier1=0 falsifier_pass=0 (dry-run; no spawn) __RC=0; prior failure was __RC=1 __HEXA_RC=2
hexa run tool/kick_dispatch.hexa kick-bench-smoke --dry-run → __KICK_RESULT__ PASS __RC=0; no regression on unrelated working topic

hook_dependency: NONE — no .git/hooks, no fswatch, no launchd added by this cycle (existing launchd plists untouched)
